dimensions.name: tool_selection
notes: 'search the code for the string TODO acro': chose search_tests, wanted search_content
'find the test files that cover the parse': chose suggest_tests, wanted search_tests
'get the details of a specific finding by': chose start_task, wanted get_finding
'what should I improve next in this codeb': chose find_callees, wanted get_next_improvement
'mark a finding as resolved': chose get_next_improvement, wanted mark_finding
'where is the function load_config define': chose find_callees, wanted find_symbol
'what calls the function save': chose subjective_review, wanted find_callers
'what functions does save call': chose search_content, wanted find_callees
'find every reference to the ConfigServic': chose get_schema, wanted find_references
'get the surrounding context for a symbol': chose get_finding_context, wanted get_symbol_context
'record that I ran the tests and they pas': chose suggest_tests, wanted record_verification
